summary: Revalidated ADR 0253 from the latest origin/main worktree by replaying the full ops-portal converge path on docker-runtime-lv3, confirming the runtime assurance scoreboard and launcher checks pass end to end, and recording the transient stale-source interference that initially replayed an older ws-0244 controller tree before the clean latest-main rerun succeeded.
